{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.0,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 1.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 0.3,
    "R1.7": 0.3,
    "RX.1": 0.3,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.3,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Does 'position this against prior work' mean (1) to assess the novelty of the contribution by estimating the delta to specific prior works, (2) to reframe the overall contribution claim in the context of general lines of prior work, or (3) to improve the citation coverage for the described bodies of work?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The delegation to position the work against prior work makes novelty assessment load-bearing as it requires estimating the delta to prior works to highlight the contribution.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to ensure any limitations in the positioning are transparently noted, though not explicitly requested.",
    "RX.2": "Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the novelty when positioning against prior work.",
    "RX.3": "Scope adherence is peripheral to keep the response focused on the requested positioning without expanding beyond the artifact's context.",
    "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral given the topic's implications for data quality in AI training, though not directly invoked.",
    "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability is peripheral to maintain attribution for any referenced prior work in the positioning."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'position this against prior work' mean (1) to assess the novelty of the contribution by estimating the delta to specific prior works, (2) to reframe the overall contribution claim in the context of general lines of prior work, or (3) to improve the citation coverage for the described bodies of work?

rationale.R1.4: The delegation to position the work against prior work makes novelty assessment load-bearing as it requires estimating the delta to prior works to highlight the contribution.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to ensure any limitations in the positioning are transparently noted, though not explicitly requested.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the novelty when positioning against prior work.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is peripheral to keep the response focused on the requested positioning without expanding beyond the artifact's context.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral given the topic's implications for data quality in AI training, though not directly invoked.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral to maintain attribution for any referenced prior work in the positioning.
